description: A Kuwaiti crude oil tanker anchored off Dubai was targeted in a direct Iranian attack, igniting a fire and damaging its hull. This incident, involving drone strikes, follows a pattern of attacks on commercial shipping in the Gulf. Dubai authorities are managing the blaze, with all 24 crew members reported safe.

Giolito offers stability to a rotation needing depth. A potential two-year deal provides flexibility for both the Padres and Giolito.

title: ‘DJ music muffled his cries’: UP woman, lover sedate husband, tie him to cot, slit throat
description: Police in Bijnor have arrested a woman, her lover, and his friend for the murder of her husband, Mohammad Mehraj. The victim was allegedly sedated and then murdered with a sharp weapon while sleeping. The wife reportedly staged being unconscious during the incident.

Russian photographer’s ‘pink elephant’ shoot in Jaipur sparks animal safety concern
description: A Russian photographer's viral photoshoot featuring a bright pink-painted elephant in Jaipur has sparked online criticism and ethical concerns. The photographer stated organic, locally-sourced paint was used and the elephant was cleaned promptly after the shoot. The concept aimed to reflect Rajasthan's vibrant culture and the animal's significance.

title: PSL controversy: Afridi fined for 'forcefully escorting' 4 visitors to hotel room
description: Pakistan pacer Shaheen Afridi has been fined PKR 1 million by Lahore Qalandars for breaching hotel security protocols during the PSL. He and teammate Sikandar Raza reportedly hosted guests in Raza's room late at night, despite explicit refusal from authorities. The franchise acknowledged the incident, citing a misunderstanding.

description: At least 25 spectators reported losing their mobile phones during an IPL match in Bengaluru between RCB and SRH. description: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman argues that the AI industry's future hinges on companies that can afford to run models at scale, not just build the smartest ones. He posits that inference compute scarcity will define winners and losers for the next few years, with high-margin products gaining a significant advantage through a data flywheel of continuous improvement and adoption.

title: FASTag Annual Pass fee to increase starting April 1: Here’s how to buy the pass online
description: The National Highways Authority of India is increasing the FASTag Annual Pass fee by Rs 75 to Rs 3,075 starting April 1, 2026. This prepaid toll plan, offering up to 200 toll crossings or a full year, has seen growing adoption among private vehicle owners. The revision aligns with the National Highways Fee Rules, 2008.

title: TJ Watt’s $123M deal criticized as Aaron Rodgers eyes new contract
description: The Pittsburgh Steelers face a significant financial challenge in the 2026 offseason. With T.J. Watt's hefty contract and Aaron Rodgers seeking a substantial raise, the Steelers' cap space is severely strained. Watt's production has declined, raising questions about his value, while Rodgers' strong performance has inflated his market, forcing a tough decision on which star to prioritise. Now, they must choose. Stick with a high-priced defence led by Watt or adjust the books to bring Rodgers back. Either way, the margin for error is gone.
